en.text: . all ye: Heb. ye people, all of them all that: Heb. the fulness thereof
is all this, and for the sins
? and what are the high places
thereof shall be beaten to pieces
. owls: Heb. daughters of the owl
. her: or, she is grievously sick of her wounds
. thou: or, thou that dwellest fairly inhabitant: Heb. inhabitress Zaanan: or, The country of flocks Bethezel: or, A place near
. inhabitant: Heb. inhabitress waited: or, was grieved
. to: or, for Moreshethgath Achzib: that is, A lie
. inhabitant: Heb. inhabitress he: or, the glory of Israel shall, etc
; for they are gone into captivity
, from which ye shall not remove
. a doleful: Heb. a lamentation of lamentations turning: or, instead of restoring
Therefore thou shalt have none that shall cast
ye not, say they to them that prophesy
to them, that they shall not take
. Prophesy ye: or, Prophesy not as they prophesy: Heb. Drop, etc
? straitened: or, shortened? uprightly: Heb. upright?
. of late: Heb. yesterday with the: Heb. over against a
; for this is not your rest
; he shall even be the prophet
. walking: or, walk with the wind, and lie falsely
, all of thee; I will surely
by reason of the multitude of men
; Is it not for you to know
from off them, and their flesh
from off them; and they break
, as they have behaved themselves ill
shall be unto you, that ye shall not have a vision
unto you, that ye shall not divine
over them. that: vision: Heb. from a vision that: divine: Heb. from divining
this, I pray you, ye heads
upon us. and say: Heb. saying
it shall come to pass, that the mountain
; and none shall make them afraid
, and her that I have afflicted
, and her that was cast far off
thee as a woman in travail
: for now shalt thou go forth
: and thou shalt beat in pieces
, yet out of thee shall he come forth
unto me that is to be ruler
. everlasting: Heb. the days of eternity
Therefore will he give them up
: for now shall he be great
And this man shall be the peace
. waste: Heb. eat up in the: or, with her own naked swords
And it shall come to pass in that day
of thee, and I will destroy
; and thou shalt have no more soothsayers
of thee; and thou shalt no more worship
of thee: so will I destroy
, such as they have not heard
unto thee? and wherein have I wearied
? of a: Heb. sons of a year?
? walk: Heb. humble thyself to walk
it. the man: or, thy name shall see that which is
? Are: or, Is there yet unto every man an house of the, etc scant: Heb. measure of leanness
? count: or, be pure with, etc
Therefore also will I make thee sick
of thee; and thou shalt take hold
. For the: or, For he doth much keep the, etc desolation: or, astonishment
is me! for I am as when they have gathered
. when: Heb. the gatherings of summer
. his: Heb. the mischief of his soul
of them is as a brier
is sharper than a thorn hedge
not against me, O mine enemy
for me: he will bring me forth
Then she that is mine enemy
unto me, Where is the LORD
her: now shall she be trodden down
. Then: or, And thou wilt see her that is mine enemy, and cover her with shame shall she: Heb. she shall be for a treading down
. Notwithstanding: or, After that it hath been
because of thee. worms: or, creeping things
